texto: If the food of friendship is time together, how do we make the time to ensure we're all fed? My friends and I have recently come across a way to keep each other close. It fits into our lifestyles despite busy schedules and a surfeit of children. We call it the 'kibbutz.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nir Eyal que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “If the food of friendship is time together, how do we make the time to ensure we're all fed? My f…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, time, food, com foco em termino e food.
